name: cpig-bool-refactor-04-smoothunion-k5
description: CPigSmoothUnion with k=5 (positive blend radius) on two libfive spheres. Both operands libfive → libfive smoothunion fast path (implicit_field.cpp:744-749 — quadratic smin composed as a libfive tree → Kind::LIBFIVE result). Phase 1 left this path unchanged. Visual: two spheres with a smooth blended bridge between them.

checkpoints.name: smoothunion-k5
checkpoints.description: Smooth union of two spheres at +/-10 with k=5. Visible smooth blend bridge between the two spheres (libfive smin composition).
